claim: Browser memory in agent interfaces enables agents to recall visited sites and content across sessions
actionable: Enable browser memory in agent tools to provide persistent context across multiple tasks

claim: Computer use agents running in browsers are slow and better suited for background/batched execution
actionable: Run browser agents in background mode rather than watching real-time execution

claim: Inline text generation (cursor chat) removes friction of copying text between tools
actionable: Use inline text generation features for quick email replies and local text composition
